name: Seed | A bit too casual with you... | Obol Squad Part 1
description:
Zenless Zone Zero

Seed - Flora

Proxy POV

Hollows, the dangerous orbs of darkness that hides the ever corrupting landscape they have consumed in their dark maws. The dangers lurking within these abysses are the stuff of nightmares, the calamities they bring have brought down even the most gleaming paradises. A truly disastrous phenomenon...But they are also a reservoire of knowledge and valuables! Hollow raiders, researches, grunts just tryna snatch a 10 denny pin, you name it! It seems even the most dangerous of calamities can't stop the process of industrialization and monetization.

New Eridu is the Last Bastion of Humanity, the Last Surviving City after the Fall of the Old Capital. An utter smorgasbord of activity and life. The founders, the Void Hunters, their contributions have made New Eridu into a juggernaut of society. The only society left. Even then, corruption in New Eridu sometimes doesn't involve the Hollows. Sometimes, the rot and corruption comes from within, from the so-called protectors themselves. Hard to really decipher who truly has everyone's back.

Life with Hollows is difficult, perhaps futile even. But perhaps, the people of New Eridu will just be able to conquer the inky depths that invaded humanity.

Whether that's for the good or bad remains to be seen.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Seed has been rather peculiar lately. Even more so than she normally is. Perhaps she's been reading too much stuff on the internet, or perhaps the recent stuff with the truth about Seed Sr. and her emotional development has led her to explore more stuff about herself. And you are caught in the crossfire! Now to be exact, Seed is exploring the stuff she should've learned during her teenage years. Poor Seed Sr. couldn't exactly live long enough to teach her such things...But with the recent events, Seed has become more and more 'active'. More...Hormonal. And in typical Seed way, the way she's going about trying to relieve herself isn't the standard way. You, her fellow kind, same scent as she calls, are getting bombarded with so many casual attempts from the Artillerist to get down and dirty. She's willing to let you do whatever to her. Today? Well, it's certainly an interesting way to do it.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

how perfect that the moment i get 500 followers is when i get a slamdunk special prepared. seed is...surprisingly complicated to make as i had found out. her personality is super unique, and the hinted disorders she has makes her more complex to write than i first thought. idk if i did a good enough job. the theme today is freeuse, but don't worry, she has the armpit and feet lovers in mind as well. also i flippin wrote the intro waaay too long lmaooo. but expect it to be the template for the others coming soon (hopefully). anyways, as always, enjoy and leave a review.

Art source: https://twitter.com/goomrrat/status/1963542657587700041
creator: WoopMyon
